statement: NVIDIA increased total supply, inclusive of inventory purchase commitments and prepaids, to $145 billion in Q1 FY2027.
why: A large increase in total supply commitments shows NVIDIA scaling its supply chain to meet demand it describes as parabolic.

impact.mechanism: Rising inventory purchase commitments and prepaids expand forward GPU supply capacity across the chain.

evidence.source: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 earnings call transcript (via The Motley Fool)
evidence.excerpt: In Q1, we increased total supply inclusive of inventory purchase commitments on prepaids to $145 billion.
total supply inclusive of inventory purchase commitments and prepaids was increased to $145 billion in Q1.

confidence.basis: Secondary transcript of official IR earnings call (single publisher); figure corroborated in NVIDIA 10-Q materials.
